# services.clickhouse

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.clickhouse`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.clickhouse.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ClickHouse database server. |
| `services.clickhouse.extraServerConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional raw XML configuration for ClickHouse server. |
| `services.clickhouse.extraUsersConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional raw XML configuration for ClickHouse server. |
| `services.clickhouse.package` | `package` | The clickhouse package to use. |
| `services.clickhouse.serverConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Your {file}`config.yaml` as a Nix attribute set. Check the [documentation](https://clickhouse.com/docs/operations/configuration-files) for possible options. |
| `services.clickhouse.usersConfig` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Your {file}`users.yaml` as a Nix attribute set. Check the [documentation](https://clickhouse.com/docs/operations/configuration-files#user-settings) for possible options. |
